Home / Services / Hurricane Prep Detailing

Hurricane Prep Detailing

Protect your vehicle before storm season hits.

Savannah's hurricane threats demand special automotive preparation most detailers overlook. Our pre-storm service goes beyond washing to create protective barriers against wind-driven rain, flying debris, and potential flooding.

We start by applying temporary sacrificial coatings that shield paint from projectiles during evacuations. Rubber and vinyl components receive conditioning to prevent drying and cracking when exposed to prolonged moisture. Door seals get specialized treatment to maintain water resistance even during days of heavy rain.

The interior protection package includes mold inhibitors for carpets and upholstery - crucial if floodwaters breach your garage. We also treat electrical connections with hydrophobic compounds that displace moisture. Battery terminals receive anticorrosion treatment anticipating saltwater intrusion.

After the storm passes, our post-hurricane inspection identifies early signs of water damage before they become major issues. Many Isle of Hope and Whitemarsh Island residents schedule this service annually in early June.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Impact-resistant temporary clear coat application
  2. 02 Step 2: Flood-preparation interior treatments
  3. 03 Step 3: Electrical system moisture protection
  4. 04 Step 4: Emergency contact information etching

Benefits

  • Reduces storm-related paint damage by up to 90%
  • Prevents musty odors from water intrusion
  • Maintains door seal integrity during heavy rains
  • Simplifies post-storm cleanup

Frequently Asked Questions

How long do the protective treatments last?

The storm-specific coatings remain effective for 6-8 weeks. We recommend scheduling within hurricane season's peak months.

Do you offer evacuation vehicle prep?

Yes. Our 24-hour emergency service includes survival kit storage solutions and emergency fuel system treatments.

Can this help with insurance claims?

We provide pre-storm condition documentation that simplifies the claims process if damage occurs despite our protections.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with hurricane prep detailing? Contact us today.
